Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm drenched from the rain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My whole body is shivering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}According to the news, a typhoon just hit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Apparently, it's the biggest one on record. It's moving slowly too, so it'll be gloomy for a while...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yeah, thanks to that, the school festival got canned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Welp, less work for us in the end, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Still sucks that we'll be stuck indoors for vacation though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Oh, yeah? You always seem to keep busy, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I always did picture you as a guy with too much free time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Seriously? Dude, you're killin' me here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Me? The only thing I plan to do is go to the movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Ooh, a movie? Do you have a date?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I'm going with Natsuki-chan. We actually talk about movies all the time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But with this typhoon, I don't know if we'll make it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}How 'bout you, Yuka-tan? Still gonna have practice?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}The archery range is outside, so it's most likely canceled until the storm blows over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Same here. This stupid typhoon is gonna mess up my training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You gotta be booked, right, Kirijo-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Why are you so curious about our business, Iori?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Oh, me? Well, I'd be happy to tell you about my plans...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I suspect that you will be visiting Chidori-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Although she is in stable condition now, we still can't release her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Man, Ai-chan, you must be psychic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}And ya know what? She even told me she wants me to come![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}...Oh man, I can't believe she said that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}So, I figured I should probably check up on her. Y'know, with the storm and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...What's with him? Why's he all excited?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Um... Oh! Amada-kun, what are your plans during the break?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Oh, I'm not really doing anything in particular...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Come on, you gotta be doing something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Oh, I'll probably go visit the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Dude, you're a kid, not an old man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I guess you could say I have a wish I want granted...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Anyway, I'm going back to my room. I've got a lot of homework to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Oh, okay. Just holler if you get stuck, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}
